import os, torch, json, sys
from model import PretrainedViT

device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')
ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/model.pt', map_location=device)
backbone = ckpt.get('backbone', 'vit_base_patch16_224.augreg_in21k_ft_in1k')
dropout = ckpt.get('dropout', 0.0)
model = PretrainedViT(num_classes=100, backbone=backbone, dropout=dropout).to(device)
model.head.load_state_dict(ckpt['head'])
model.eval()

data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
val = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val.pt'))
dummy = {'images': val['images'][:16]}
os.makedirs('dummy_test', exist_ok=True)
torch.save(dummy, 'dummy_test/test.pt')

os.system('python predict.py --data_path dummy_test --checkpoint checkpoints/model.pt --output dummy_out.json')
with open('dummy_out.json') as f:
    out = json.load(f)
print('num preds:', len(out['predictions']))
assert len(out['predictions']) == 16
print('verify_predict PASSED')
